children.name: You can disable public registration for new users. You will still able to create new users in administration panel.
children.characters: You can disable public registration for new users. You will still able to create new users in administration panel.

children.name: Turn on, if you want verify user email address after registration.
children.characters: Turn on, if you want verify user email address after registration.

children.name: Did you change anything in your .env file? Then clear your cache.
children.characters: Did you change anything in your .env file? Then clear your cache.

children.name: Please do not change in production environment.
children.characters: Please do not change in production environment.

children.name: If you want to set max file size limit on single upload, add size of your limit in MB. E.g. 100 means 100 MB and 2 000 means 2 000 MB limit.
children.characters: If you want to set max file size limit on single upload, add size of your limit in MB. E.g. 100 means 100 MB and 2 000 means 2 000 MB limit.

children.name: When you upload file on the server, your file will be sliced into many chunks in this size. Small size of the chunk can prevent many limits you can suffer from your server or provider. Default value is 64MB if is not set.
children.characters: When you upload file on the server, your file will be sliced into many chunks in this size. Small size of the chunk can prevent many limits you can suffer from your server or provider. Default value is 64MB if is not set.

children.name: If you want to prevent upload some type of files, just add them to blacklist like this: x-php,mp3,jpeg Use a comma between each mimetype. Don't use a dot before mimetypes.
children.characters: If you want to prevent upload some type of files, just add them to blacklist like this: x-php,mp3,jpeg Use a comma between each mimetype. Don't use a dot before mimetypes.

children.name: Type -1 to set unlimited team members.
children.characters: Type -1 to set unlimited team members.

children.name: ReCaptcha will be allowed on Registration and Contact Us forms.
children.characters: ReCaptcha will be allowed on Registration and Contact Us forms.

children.name: Pasted your Google ReCaptcha Site Key
children.characters: Pasted your Google ReCaptcha Site Key

children.name: Pasted your Google ReCaptcha Secret Key
children.characters: Pasted your Google ReCaptcha Secret Key
